payload.text:
ABN AI APP BUILDER MASTER SCRIPT

Project Name: Animal Sound Intelligence (ASI)


---

GLOBAL APP DESCRIPTION (Paste into ABN Project Overview)

Build a cross-platform AI-powered mobile and web application called Animal Sound Intelligence (ASI). The app studies, learns, and interprets animal and pet sounds using audio, video, and human-provided explanations. The AI continuously improves through verified user feedback and integrates with smartphones, smart home devices, and IoT hardware to monitor animals, detect emergencies, and translate animal sounds into human-understandable meanings. The app must also support wildlife monitoring and accessibility features for people with hearing or speaking disabilities.


---

APP TYPE

Mobile App (Android & iOS)

Web Dashboard (Admin, Research, Vet use)



---

USER ROLES

1. Pet Owner (Default)


2. Veterinarian / Expert Reviewer


3. Researcher / Wildlife Mode User


4. Accessibility User


5. Admin




---

AUTHENTICATION MODULE

Screen: Authentication

Components

Email Input Field

Phone Number Input Field

Password Field

Google Sign-In Button


Logic

On successful login, redirect to Onboarding if first-time user

Returning users go directly to Home Dashboard



---

ONBOARDING FLOW

Screen: Animal Profile Setup

UI Elements

Text Input: Animal Name

Dropdown: Animal Type (Dog, Cat, Bird, Livestock, Exotic, Wild)

Dropdown: Environment (Indoor, Outdoor, Farm, Forest, Urban)

Optional Inputs: Age, Breed


Button

Continue


Action

Save animal profile

Initialize AI learning context for this animal



---

HOME DASHBOARD

Screen: Home Dashboard

Widgets

1. Live Animal Status Card

Displays: Calm / Alert / Distressed / Emergency



2. AI Insight Panel

Shows AI-generated explanation of recent sounds



3. Emergency Indicator Banner

Normal (Green)

Warning (Orange)

Emergency (Red)





---

Buttons on Dashboard

Listen Live

Activates microphone or connected device

Starts real-time sound classification


View Camera Feed

Opens live or recorded video feed


Upload & Teach AI

Navigates to Learning Screen


Sound Translator

Navigates to Translation Screen


Connect Devices

Navigates to Device Integration Screen




---

UPLOAD & TEACH AI MODULE (CORE FEATURE)

Screen: Teach the AI

Inputs

Upload Audio File (.wav, .mp3)

Upload Video File (.mp4)


AI Actions

Extract sound features

Extract body language from video


User Explanation Section

Text Area: "Explain what this sound means"

Voice Input Option


Verification Checkbox

Label: "I confirm this explanation is honest and accurate"


Buttons

Train AI


Logic

Store data as Human-Verified Training Sample

Increase model confidence weight

Queue sample for optional expert review



---

SOUND TRANSLATION MODULE

Screen: Sound Meaning Translator

Buttons

Analyze Current Sound

Analyze Uploaded Sound


AI Output Fields

Detected Emotion

Possible Intent

Confidence Percentage


Optional Actions

Play Voice Explanation

Display Visual Icons



---

EMERGENCY DETECTION MODULE

Automatic Triggers

Pain frequency patterns

Panic or aggression signals

Abnormal silence


Emergency Actions

Push notification to user phone

Optional auto-call

Display emergency instructions

Suggest nearest veterinarian



---

SMART DEVICE & IOT INTEGRATION

Screen: Device Integration

Supported Devices

Smart Speakers

Security Cameras

Pet Collars

Baby Monitors


Buttons

Add New Device

Enable Background Listening

Emergency Auto-Response Toggle


Logic

Devices stream audio securely

AI processes locally or cloud-based



---

WILDLIFE MODE MODULE

Screen: Wildlife Mode

Features

Identify distress or danger calls

Detect illegal activity indicators

Migration sound pattern analysis


Buttons

Enable Wildlife Mode

Upload Field Recordings



---

ACCESSIBILITY MODE MODULE

Hearing Assistance

Animal sounds converted to text

Visual alerts and vibrations


Speaking Assistance

Button-based commands

AI-generated calming sounds



---

AI SYSTEM LOGIC (ABN BACKEND)

Models Used

Audio Classification Model

Emotion Detection Model

Contextual Reasoning Model

Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback


Learning Loop

1. Sound Input


2. Context Analysis


3. Human Explanation


4. AI Update


5. Confidence Adjustment




---

DATA & PRIVACY CONTROLS

User Settings

Enable / Disable recording

Local processing mode

Data sharing permissions



---

MONETIZATION LOGIC

Free Tier: One animal, limited uploads

Pro Tier: Live monitoring, emergency alerts

Research Tier: Wildlife dashboards



---

ADMIN DASHBOARD (WEB)

Features

Review training samples

Manage AI model versions

Approve expert-labeled data



---

FINAL BUILD INSTRUCTION FOR ABN AI

Generate the full application with:

Clean, modern UI

Accessibility-first design

Modular AI architecture

Scalable backend

Real-time audio processing


Ensure all buttons trigger their described logic and all AI learning is cumulative, ethical, and transparent.


---

END OF ABN AI APP BUILDER SCRIPT

entries.description: App metadata with camera and microphone permissions for animal sound analysis and video feed.
Primary HTML entry point with Tailwind CSS and FontAwesome for icons.
Gemini API integration service for processing audio and video content.
Application entry point using React 18 createRoot.
Bottom navigation bar for mobile feel.
Main application component with state management and routing logic.
Dashboard view showing status, insights, and quick actions.
Translation module using microphone and file upload.
Core feature for reinforcement learning with user feedback.
IoT and smart home integration view.

Fast AI responses

audio_spark
Create conversational voice apps
Conversational voice apps with Gemini Live

**Initiating Gemini Integration**

I'm currently focused on enhancing the "Animal Sound Intelligence (ASI)" app. My primary task now is to integrate Gemini's capabilities. Specifically, I am concentrating on incorporating Search Grounding, Speech-to-Text, and Text-to-Speech functionalities into the existing ASI framework. My goal is to add robust features, allowing users to interact with the app naturally.


**Expanding Functionality With Gemini**

I'm now diving into adding real-time capabilities. I'm updating `services/geminiService.ts` to include Google Search and Maps grounding, implementing a thinking configuration, and adding TTS support via `gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts`. I'm also implementing Live API connection logic. In `views/Translator.tsx`, I'll integrate the Live API for "Listen Live" and add a grounding toggle for Search/Maps during translation.


**Implementing New Features**

I'm now incorporating a "Chat with ASI" feature into `views/Home.tsx` using `gemini-3-pro-preview` or the Live API. I'll also display search results, integrating grounding chunks for user context. I'm considering how to manage the Live API session state in `App.tsx`. Furthermore, I'm developing `components/AudioPlayer.tsx` to handle PCM data playback from TTS. I'm also adding real-time microphone streaming logic to `views/Translator.tsx`.

entries.description: Extended types to support grounding metadata and search results.
Advanced Gemini service integrating Search Grounding, Thinking, and TTS.
Upgraded Translator with Gemini Live API for real-time animal sound interpretation.
Enhanced Home with grounding links, suggested actions, and TTS playback.
